basics.name: Faisal Mohammed Ibrahim
basics.label: Engineering Manager | Solution Architect | Principal Engineer
basics.summary: Engineering Leader with 16+ years of experience delivering enterprise-scale software solutions across consulting and product engineering organizations. Specialized in Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, AWS Cloud, Kubernetes, DevOps, CI/CD, Enterprise Architecture, Cloud Modernization and Engineering Leadership.

highlights: Lead design and delivery of enterprise-grade cloud-native applications.
Drive Agile delivery practices and stakeholder communication.
Mentor engineering teams and establish architecture and DevOps best practices.
Support cloud-first modernization strategies using AWS and Kubernetes.
Supported enterprise cloud and application modernization initiatives.
Worked on backend engineering, cloud deployment and DevOps automation.
Participated in architecture reviews and technical design discussions.
Designed enterprise software solutions for large-scale product platforms.
Led backend engineering using Java, Spring Boot and Microservices.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure improvements.
Contributed to platform modernization and architecture reviews.

experience.position: Software Development Associate Manager / Team Lead / Senior Analyst
highlights: Led development teams delivering enterprise applications for global clients.
Managed end-to-end software delivery and stakeholder coordination.
Drove Agile, DevOps and modernization initiatives.
Worked on hospitality client applications and digital transformation programs.

experience.position: Technology Analyst / Senior Systems Engineer / Systems Engineer
highlights: Developed enterprise Java applications and integration solutions.
Served as onsite lead for Saudi Railways engagement.
Participated in architecture discussions, production support and release management.

achievements: SME at Customer Site, Saudi Arabia
